case_title: RICK FREGOSO, ASSIGNEE OF MISSION NATL BANK vs. STROCKBINE, DANIEL L. et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICK FREGOSO, ASSIGNEE OF MISSION NATL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT STROCKBINE, DANIEL L. DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-18-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-19-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-28-1994
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-18-1994, CONTINUED TO DEC-02-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICK FREGOSO, ASSIGNEE OF MISSION NATL BANK SERVED OCT-26-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STROCKBINE, DANIEL L.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-02-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-04-1995 CONTINUED FROM DEC-02-1994 TO JAN-04-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF RICK FREGOSO, ASSIGNEE OF MISSION NATL BANK
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-04-1995, OFF CALENDAR
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICK FREGOSO, ASSIGNEE OF MISSION NATL BANK
